title: 160 Pieces Dual-Use Interdental Brushes, Silicone Tooth Floss Picks Dental Picks Interdental Brush Toothpick Dental Brushes Teeth Brush Picks for Braces Oral Cleaning
features: 【Keep your Oral Health】Soft silicone toothpicks have flexible bristles that gently remove food residue and massage gums. it is a must-have item to keep your teeth clean and safe, floss and remove plaque, clean space between teeth, provide you with quality oral care products and keep your teeth health

【Ergonomic design】 you can use the toothpick at both ends, soft material gently touches your mouth, the curved design makes it more flexible to clean your mouth, the tip makes it ideal for cleaning in smaller and wider spaces, and the texture on the handle has an anti-slip effect, making it easier to control during use; The longer handle provides better feel and handling. Disposable design, discarded after each use, helps maintain cleanliness.

【Portable size design】this set of dental floss brushes with a storage box is small in size, light in weight, compact and convenient, which is convenient to put in a pocket or wallet, flexible for you to take it anywhere

【Versatile Applications】 this soft toothpick is small and flexible, it can not only clean teeth but also effectively clean dental appliances, implants, and bridges, which are easy to hide dirt in the oral cavity; It can easily enter the narrow gap area for cleaning; Help you maintain a healthy oral and a good personal image

【Nice gift choice】these floss tooth cleaning tool toothpick sets can be shared as a nice gift with the people you care about, maybe your family, or your friends, they will be pleased to receive this sweet gift.
